# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties: {}

  VPCRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      RouteTableAssociation:
        - Ref: PublicSubnetAssociation
      Routes:
        - DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
          GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.GatewayId

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::SubnetAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref VPCRouteTable

  InternetGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VGWAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.GatewayId
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
